bag of tricks.title: Bag of Tricks
bag of tricks.description: Whether they walk, swim or fly, generate a random Beast to pull out of your Bag of Tricks. Or for your Druid to Polymorph into.

critical hit/miss modifiers.title: Critical Hit/Miss Modifiers
critical hit/miss modifiers.description: Add an extra demension to critical rolls with additional modifiers. From status conditions and bonus actions to extra damage dice, make your players feel like total badasses...or like the biggest fools this side of Eberron.

deck of many things.title: Deck of Many Things
deck of many things.description: Inject a little chaos into your campaign by giving your party a Deck of Many Things. Simply draw a card, sit back, and watch as the Nine Hells break loose.

gp lottery.title: GP Lottery
gp lottery.description: Whether looted from a fallen enemy or pickpocketed by your light-fingered Rogue, generate a level-appropriate amount of gold for your players. Or reward the entire party with a full-on Dragon hoard.

initiative tracker.title: Initiative Tracker
initiative tracker.description: We've all done it: lost track of who's up next and accidentally skipped someone's go. Never again! Simply input everyone's initiative roll and swipe your way through the encounter, marking players as dead and moving towards that inevitable Total Party Wipe

loot randomiser.title: Loot Randomiser
loot randomiser.description: Instead of gold, reward your players with a random item drop. With resources ranging from simple trinkets, to Health Potions and consumables, all the way up to Legendary magic items, looting has never been more exciting.

name generator.title: Name Generator
name generator.description: Players shown an interest in a random NPC? Quickly generate a name for them. Now they've invited that NPC along on a quest? Transfer their name to the NPC Generator and roll them up a statblock.

npc generator.title: NPC Generator
npc generator.description: Bring your NPCs to life with custom statblocks, including unique traits, attacks and spells. Never again will you be caught off-guard by your party abducting the local stableboy and turning them into an reluctant hero.

random encounter.title: Random Encounter
random encounter.description: Session running short? Generate a random, level-appropriate encounter for your party. Or give them a scare by scaling up the difficulty a bit.

spellbook.title: Spellbook
spellbook.description: Generate spells based on their level, from simple Cantrips to powerful 9th-Level incantations. Or embrace chaos and flip to a random page of your spellbook.

vicious mockery.title: Vicious Mockery
vicious mockery.description: In our campaign, Vicious Mockery was less of a spell, more a passive ability. Anyone could "cast" it as a Free Action, without expending a spell slot, and the damage output was directly related to how savage or clever a player's words were.

wild magic surge.title: Wild Magic Surge
wild magic surge.description: Rather than flipping through the Player's Handbook everytime your Sorcerer triggers a Wild Magic Surge, simply click a button to reveal what random nonsense has befallen them this time.

power word.title: Power Word
power word.description: Party taking too long to solve your puzzle? Wizard not prepared their spells (again)? Got a bit of time to kill? Play what is essentially D&D Hangman. You're behind a screen, they'll never know.
